case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. TERESA GARCIA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, TERESA
